text:
miwi        2008-11-09 16:46:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/libopensync-plugin-file Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The file-sync opensync plugin is intended to synchronize all kinds of data
  directly to the file-system. It is mainly used for backup and testing.
  
  WWW: http://www.opensync.org/
  
  PR:             ports/128628
  Submitted by:   Alex Samorukov <samm at os2.kiev.ua>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.342     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-file/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-file/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-file/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/deskutils/libopensync-plugin-file/pkg-plist (new)
